InfluencerAI

Social Bot Hub

Run your entire social engine

Connect every channel, generate 20-piece content sets, review logs, and publish scheduled posts from one place.

Connect Accounts

Link Instagram, Facebook, X, LinkedIn, TikTok, Threads, YouTube, and Pinterest.

Code Assistant

Use Codex to draft code, patches, and implementation ideas, then apply patches locally in development.

20 Content Ideas

Generate and save 20 resume-focused social posts for resumevaultgod.com.

Queue & Schedule

Create posts, generate captions, and manage the publishing queue.

Publishing Settings

Tune brand voice, audience, and post frequency.

What the bot can do

  • - Generate 20-post content vaults for resumevaultgod.com.
  • - Connect accounts across Instagram, Facebook, X, LinkedIn, TikTok, Threads, YouTube, Pinterest, and Reddit.
  • - Build draft, scheduled, and published queues from one dashboard.
  • - Draft code, patches, and feature scaffolds with Codex inside the bot.
  • - Use publishing settings to keep voice and cadence consistent.
